Dysphagia Knowledge Hub — 吞嚥困難知識庫

Hong Kong and GBA Dysphagia Food Standards

Hong Kong and the Greater Bay Area have developed the first regional Chinese-language care food standards aligned with international IDDSI principles. This section explains what these standards mean in practice for caregivers, care homes, and food manufacturers.

All HK Standards Guides

  • GBA Elderly Food Standards T/SATA 084-2025 and 085-2025 — What Manufacturers Need to Know
  • HKCSS Care Food Directory — How to Use It as a Caregiver
  • Hong Kong 護食標準 — A Comprehensive Guide to Care Food in HK and the Greater Bay Area
  • GBA Dysphagia Food Standard T/SATA 094-2025 — General Requirements for Dysphagia Food in Elderly Care
